name: @forwardimpact/pathway
description: Explore roles, generate agent profiles, and surface career expectations so progression and team configuration are visible, not guessed.
author: D. Olsson <hi@senzilla.io>

jobs.goal: See What's Expected of Humans and Agents
jobs.trigger: 'Meets expectations' on the review form has no definition anyone can point to, and an agent's work was just rejected for following generic practices instead of the organization's.
jobs.bigHire: see what's expected of me at my level and of the agents I configure, from one shared standard.
jobs.littleHire: generate a job definition, a level comparison, or an agent profile from discipline, track, and level.
jobs.competesWith: asking peers; inferring from manager comments; custom system prompts; copying another team's config; living with ambiguity

forces.push: Ambiguous expectations create review anxiety for humans and rejected work from agents.
forces.pull: One standard that produces role definitions for people and profiles for agents.
forces.habit: Inferring expectations from peer behavior and hand-tuning agent prompts per team.
forces.anxiety: Looking up the standard might confirm gaps easier left ignored.

jobs.firedWhen: defined expectations diverge from actual promotions; or configuration overhead exceeds the quality gain.
